title: Coordinate and monitor livestock transport
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Coordinate and monitor livestock transport demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for the transport of livestock

pcs.text: Check the transport directions and calculate load
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the transport directions and calculate load?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the transport directions and calculate load.

pcs.text: Determine transport requirements and engage a suitable carrier
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine transport requirements and engage a suitable carrier?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine transport requirements and engage a suitable carrier.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select and check equipment and resources for movement of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and check equipment and resources for movement of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check equipment and resources for movement of livestock.

pcs.text: Move livestock to loading facility using good stock handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move livestock to loading facility using good stock handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move livestock to loading facility using good stock handling techniques.

pcs.text: Assemble and prepare livestock for transport
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble and prepare livestock for transport?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble and prepare livestock for transport.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for the transport of livestock

elements.title: Load livestock

pcs.text: Apply workplace health and safety procedures and regulatory requirements to the loading and transportation of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply workplace health and safety procedures and regulatory requirements to the loading and transportation of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply workplace health and safety procedures and regulatory requirements to the loading and transportation of livestock.

pcs.text: Check documentation is signed by the relevant person and animal identification is in place
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check documentation is signed by the relevant person and animal identification is in place?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check documentation is signed by the relevant person and animal identification is in place.

pcs.text: Obtain relevant permits and comply with movement restrictions where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain relevant permits and comply with movement restrictions where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain relevant permits and comply with movement restrictions where required.

pcs.text: Record animal details and identification using technology
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record animal details and identification using technology?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record animal details and identification using technology.

pcs.text: Load and secure livestock using good stock handling techniques, and according to workplace health and safety, biosecurity and animal welfare procedures and requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Load and secure livestock using good stock handling techniques, and according to workplace health and safety, biosecurity and animal welfare procedures and requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load and secure livestock using good stock handling techniques, and according to workplace health and safety, biosecurity and animal welfare procedures and requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Load livestock

elements.title: Monitor transport and unload livestock

pcs.text: Communicate with the carrier to ensure livestock are transported with minimal stress and discomfort according to animal welfare requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with the carrier to ensure livestock are transported with minimal stress and discomfort according to animal welfare requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with the carrier to ensure livestock are transported with minimal stress and discomfort according to animal welfare requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure livestock are checked regularly throughout the journey and unloaded for feeding and watering
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure livestock are checked regularly throughout the journey and unloaded for feeding and watering?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure livestock are checked regularly throughout the journey and unloaded for feeding and watering.

pcs.text: Unload livestock using appropriate equipment and facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Unload livestock using appropriate equipment and facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Unload livestock using appropriate equipment and facilities.

pcs.text: Monitor livestock condition and welfare post-transport, and provide feed and water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor livestock condition and welfare post-transport, and provide feed and water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock condition and welfare post-transport, and provide feed and water.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor transport and unload livestock

elements.title: Complete transportation operations

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store equipment and resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store equipment and resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store equipment and resources.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and secure vehicle and facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and secure vehicle and facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and secure vehicle and facilities.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable equipment and facilities according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and facilities according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and facilities according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Complete and maintain records according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete and maintain records according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete and maintain records according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete transportation operations

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
